name: Field Repair Checklist — Example Pack
description: Example OKPF pack demonstrating field repair and maintenance knowledge: safety precheck, diagnostic checklist, fault symptom records, escalation rules, and post-repair verification. FOR FORMAT DEMONSTRATION ONLY — not certified repair guidance.

license.details: Example content. May be reused with attribution.

usage_policy.notes: FOR FORMAT DEMONSTRATION ONLY. This pack is not certified repair or safety guidance. Do not use to guide real maintenance work on any equipment.

expert_notes.rationale: This example demonstrates a maintenance knowledge domain without using high-stakes contexts such as aviation, medical devices, or fire-life-safety systems.
limitations: All fault symptoms and procedures are illustrative and fictional.
Not reviewed by any qualified technician.
Do not use as real repair guidance.

artifacts.title: Safety Precheck Procedure
artifacts.description: Safety checks to perform before beginning any repair activity.

artifacts.title: Diagnostic Checklist
artifacts.description: Step-by-step diagnostic procedure for common equipment faults.

artifacts.title: Post-Repair Verification Checklist
artifacts.description: Verification steps to confirm successful repair before returning equipment to service.

records.description: Structured fault symptom records with diagnostic notes.

evals.description: Sample evaluation questions for repair procedure knowledge.
